replacements.originalText: Experimental features that may change or be removed
replacements.changeText: 可能变更或移除的实验性功能

replacements.originalText: By default, get notifications for stable updates. In Early Access, pre-release builds may be unstable for production work.
replacements.changeText: 默认接收稳定版更新通知。早期访问中的预发布版本可能不适合生产环境。

replacements.originalText: Update Access is managed by internal release-track policy.
replacements.changeText: 更新渠道由内部发布轨道策略管理。

replacements.originalText: Enterprise users can only be notified on stable updates.
replacements.changeText: 企业用户仅可接收稳定版更新通知。

replacements.originalText: This track will silently download and install updates without prompting whenever Cursor is closed.
replacements.changeText: 此渠道会在 Cursor 关闭时静默下载并安装更新，不会提示确认。

replacements.originalText: Log extension host RPC messages to JSON files viewable in Perfetto for performance analysis. Requires a restart to take effect.
replacements.changeText: 将扩展宿主 RPC 消息记录为 JSON 文件，可在 Perfetto 中查看以进行性能分析。需要重启后生效。

replacements.originalText: Enable logging of extension host RPC messages to JSON files viewable in Perfetto. Requires restart.
replacements.changeText: 启用扩展宿主 RPC 消息日志（JSON 格式，可在 Perfetto 中查看）。需要重启。
启用 Solid 开发工具
